name: documents
notes: A new row is inserted by POST /api/upload with name, file_type (MIME string), file_path (/uploads/{uuid}{ext}), tags (null for click-to-upload — frontend sends no tags field), and uploaded_by (req.user.email or null).
uploaded_at is set by the column DEFAULT NOW() in the migration; the INSERT does not supply it explicitly.

name: documents_v2
notes: Populated automatically by trigger trg_sync_to_v2 immediately after the documents INSERT; the trigger function copies id, name, file_type, file_path, uploaded_at, and uploaded_by but deliberately omits tags.
A freshly uploaded document therefore has tags = null in documents_v2 regardless of any tags supplied during upload; they remain null until a separate PUT /api/documents/{id}/tags call is made.
